pre_game.message: Hey, I'm E. It's a bit crowded in here, isn't it? What brought you to this game?
Hey E, I'm D. It’s definitely a bit tight in here. Honestly, I'm just here for the money—got some people back home I really want to take care of. What about you?
I'm in the same boat. I've got people back home I care about too, and winning this would make a huge difference for all of us.
I hear you. It’s the best reason to be here. Any idea what kind of game we're actually in for, or are we all just flying blind?
Honestly, I’m just as clueless as you are—feels like we’re all just waiting for the other shoe to drop.
For real. The waiting is the worst part. I’m just ready to get this show on the road and see what we're up against.
I'm with you. The nerves are definitely kicking in, but I'm ready to focus and get that prize money.
Exactly. Let’s keep that focus. The sooner we start, the sooner we can get back to our families with that cash.
Absolutely. Just trying to keep my head in the game until it kicks off.
Same here. Good luck, E. I'm going to see who else is around. Catch you later.
Good luck to you too, D. Hope we both end up winning something for our families. See you later.

post_game.message: I'm glad we all took the $10,000 fair share. It's great to see such perfect cooperation!
I'm glad we all took our fair share of $10,000. It's great that everyone walked away with the same amount!
Absolutely, it was a pleasure to cooperate and see everyone benefit equally.
